content.summary: Anv (studio.gameberry.anv) Auto-detected CONTENT parameters parameters extracted by AI Tester observation.

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract auto-detected content parameters design parameters from Anv via automated observation.
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: Rpg genre entry in Design DB. Anv provides baseline auto-detected content parameters data.
